objects.description: An old, rusted fire extinguisher with a cylindrical shape and a handle on top. The body is primarily orange with black rust patches. A label is visible on the side with instructions and text. The background is plain white.

A festive sweater with a red collar and cuffs. The sweater features horizontal green and red stripes with white Christmas-themed patterns, including bells, Christmas trees, and snowmen. The background is plain white.

The image shows a cylindrical object resembling a futuristic container or device. It has a dark gray body with metallic bands wrapped around it, featuring glowing green rectangular lights. There are blue circular details and a small screen with a lock icon on the front.

The image shows a weathered, light blue shelf with two levels. On the top shelf, there is a green pear-shaped object and a red sphere, both resting on a brown, uneven surface. The bottom shelf contains a pink oval object on a similar brown surface. The shelf has a rustic appearance with visible wear and tear.

The image shows a symmetrical, rectangular object with a metallic appearance. It has a central panel with a circular emblem and two rectangular orange panels on either side. The edges are accented with orange and feature a honeycomb pattern. The background is plain white.

The image shows a rectangular object with a yellow border and a dark central area. There are two blue rectangles in the middle, separated by a vertical line. The top and bottom sections are dark, with the top having a yellow outline and the bottom having a blue base. The object appears to be a mechanical or electronic component.

The image shows a Game Boy Advance SP with a blue casing featuring flame designs in red and orange. The screen displays the title screen of the game 'Fire Emblem: The Sacred Stones' with Japanese text and a sword graphic. The device has a directional pad on the left, two circular buttons on the right, and a speaker grille below the screen.

The image shows a cigarette with a gray, textured object resembling a piece of rock or mineral replacing the typical filter. The cigarette has a white middle section and a yellowish-brown bottom. The background is plain white.

The image features a mechanical object resembling a bomb with a cylindrical body and multiple protruding elements. It has a dark gray base color with vibrant neon accents in pink, blue, and green. The top has a handle and a pipe extending from it. The front displays graffiti-like symbols including 'Z', 'X', and 'O'. The bottom has four circular components with cross symbols.

The image features an abstract, irregularly shaped object with a predominantly teal color and white patches. The object has a smooth, glossy texture and appears to be floating against a plain white background. The shape is asymmetrical with multiple curves and edges, resembling a stylized rock or sculpture.

A snowman with a top hat and an orange carrot nose stands on a flat surface. The snowman has dark, claw-like hands and a textured, snow-covered body with red stains. The background is plain white, emphasizing the snowman's features.

The image shows a weathered, rusty metal sign with faded white paint and red graffiti. The graffiti includes an arrow pointing to the right and partially visible letters. The sign is mounted on a metal frame, showing signs of wear and tear with rust and dirt.

A blue and white porcelain cup and saucer with intricate floral patterns. The cup has a wide brim and sits on a matching saucer with scalloped edges. Both pieces feature detailed blue designs on a white background, with a thin gold rim at the top of the cup and the saucer's edge.

A dark brown bottle with a red cap and label is placed on a pinkish marble surface. Next to it is a black hookah stem with a base, partially obscured by a gray, wavy line. The background is plain white.

A cylindrical red object with a textured surface and rectangular patterns is shown. The object has a segmented appearance with darker lines and squares, resembling a mechanical or industrial design. The background is plain white.

A cylindrical object resembling a futuristic device with a metallic gray body and red horizontal lines. It has a blue lightning bolt symbol and a blue button on top, with a white ring attached to the side. The base is white with blue accents.

A wooden figure stands upright with a stern expression, featuring a black vest, white shirt, and red polka dot scarf. The figure has green pants and orange accents on the hands and feet. The background is plain white, highlighting the figure's distinct colors and simple design.

A green horse head sculpture is mounted on a decorative base with intricate patterns. The base features beige and gold colors with circular and geometric designs. The background is plain white, highlighting the sculpture.

The image features a statue of a deity with an elephant head, seated in a cross-legged position. The figure has four arms, each holding different objects, and is adorned with intricate jewelry and a detailed headdress. The background is plain white, emphasizing the statue's detailed craftsmanship. The statue is primarily in shades of beige and brown.

The image shows a detailed anatomical model of a human brain section. It features various colored parts representing different brain structures, including a green tree-like structure, yellow and white areas, and red and blue lines indicating blood vessels or neural pathways. The model is three-dimensional with distinct layers and textures, highlighting the complexity of the brain's anatomy.

A wooden barrel with a cylindrical shape and metal bands around it. The barrel has a rich brown color with visible wood grain texture. The bands are silver-gray, providing structural support. The background is plain white, emphasizing the barrel.

A black and gray structure with a cylindrical base and a hexagonal top sits on a circular platform with yellow chevron markings. The top section has a metallic appearance with red and black details, resembling a futuristic device or machine. The background is plain white.

The image features a rectangular gray object with a textured surface, resembling a stone or concrete block. Above it is a smaller, triangular orange shape, positioned centrally. The background is plain white, emphasizing the two shapes.

The image features a cylindrical object with a dark blue body and horizontal gray stripes. It has a black top and bottom with yellow lines. Two black, curved legs extend downward, ending in red and white connectors. The background is plain white.

The image features a pair of binoculars with yellow and green bodies, blue lenses, and brown eyecups. A black strap connects the eyecups, and the background is white. The binoculars have a simple, cartoonish design.

A banjo with a circular body and a long neck is depicted. The body is gray with a pink circle, black dots, and a yellow star. The neck is wooden with strings running along it. A red ribbon is tied around the headstock. The background is white.

A small, ornate bottle with a white base and gold accents. The bottle features a painted scene of a rural landscape with a house, trees, and a body of water. The design includes decorative gold patterns around the painted image. The bottle has a rounded shape with a short neck and a flat top.

The image features a modern chair with a dark blue cushion and black metal frame, positioned next to a small wooden side table with black accents. The table has two shelves, one holding a red book and the other a black box. The background is plain white, emphasizing the furniture.

A tape measure with a black and yellow casing is shown. The tape is extended slightly, revealing a white hook at the end. The background is plain white, emphasizing the object. The casing has a rectangular label area in the center.
A dark teal vase with a wide body and narrow neck features a large red 'X' and splatter patterns. The surface has a textured, web-like design, with red accents resembling paint splatters and drips.

The image shows a round, shallow bowl with a dark brown and gold color scheme. The bowl features intricate patterns and script in gold on a dark background. The script appears to be in an ancient or traditional style, possibly of Asian origin. The bowl has a smooth, polished surface with decorative bands near the rim.

A traffic cone with alternating orange and white stripes is shown. The cone has a textured surface and is placed on a flat, orange base. The background is plain white, emphasizing the cone's colors and shape.

A blue and white porcelain teapot with intricate floral patterns sits on a wooden tray. The teapot has a rounded shape with a lid and a handle, and is accompanied by matching cups. The background is plain white, emphasizing the detailed design and color contrast of the porcelain.

The image shows a rectangular object with a weathered, industrial appearance. The top section is orange with black accents and triangular symbols. The lower section is gray with black and orange details, including buttons and directional arrows. The object has a rugged texture and appears to be a piece of machinery or equipment.
A pair of chopsticks is lifting a piece of food from a bowl containing noodles, a slice of meat, and a green leaf. The bowl is gray with a black rim, and the background is white.

A figurine of a basketball player wearing a white jersey with the number 34 and the word 'BUCKS' on it. The figure has a black pointed hat with a logo, holding a basketball. The base has 'FOX Sports Wisconsin' written on it. The background is white.

An old-fashioned camera on a tripod with a wooden body and a red cloth draped over it. The camera has a brass lens and a crank handle on the side. The tripod is made of metal with a brownish finish and has three legs for stability.

A wooden chest with a purple and brown color scheme. The chest has a metal lock in the center and ornate wood grain patterns on the lid and front. The edges are reinforced with metal bands, and it has a slightly rounded top.

A carton of Puleva Vita Calcio milk with a blue and green design. The carton features a splash of milk and blue silhouettes of people celebrating. The text highlights 50% more calcium, natural milk, vitamins D, K, B12, and phosphorus. It is labeled as semi-skimmed milk.

The image features a colorful, stylized totem-like object with a face. The top section has a brown background with decorative patterns in red, green, and yellow. The eyes are closed, and there are intricate designs around them. The middle section has a row of white teeth. The bottom section is red with green and yellow accents, resembling a mouth. The object has a cylindrical shape with ornate patterns and vibrant colors.

The image shows an open wooden chest with a green frame and red accents. The chest lid has a red emblem with a white 'M' on it. The front of the chest displays a yellow star with eyes and a red mushroom with white spots and a face. The chest appears to be from a video game, likely containing items like power-ups.

A cylindrical object with a black base and top, featuring an orange body with a white cross symbol. It has a light blue ring and a black handle on top. The object appears to be a medical or first aid device, possibly a gas mask filter or canister.

A can of 'Savage's Contaminated' cream of the crop soup with 'MachoMan' branding. The can is predominantly red and white with a blue banner. It features a circular image of a man wearing sunglasses and a headband. The label includes text like 'No Preservatives' and 'Starts with Fresh Cream.' The net weight is 10 1/4 oz.

A spray can labeled 'ZOMB-OLEUM 2 IN 1' with a green and yellow label. The can has red handprints and text warning against use on living persons, intended for zombies. Side effects listed include nausea, vomiting, headache, projectile diarrhea, hotdog fingers, swollen dumbo ears, and death.

The image features an antique brass pendulum clock with a circular white face displaying numbers and hands. It has a wooden base with a marble top, and brass columns on either side. The pendulum is visible, hanging from a horizontal bar. The clock is mounted on a dark wooden rectangular base.

A wooden mug with a rustic appearance, featuring a handle shaped like a horn. The mug has a brown wooden texture with two metallic bands wrapped around it, secured by rivets. The background is plain white, emphasizing the mug's details.

A red, hexagonal-shaped container with a weathered appearance. It features a cracked screen, a keypad, and a biohazard symbol on the top. The surface shows signs of wear and dirt, with yellowish patches and circular indentations along the top edge.

The image shows a square wooden chest with a metal frame and a metal handle in the center. The chest has a weathered, rustic appearance with visible wood grain and metal rivets along the edges. The metal parts have a rusty texture, suggesting age and wear.

A circular object with a gradient of green and pink colors. The text 'SPHEROID UNIVERSE' is at the top, and 'AN AUGMENTED REALITY PLATFORM' is at the bottom. There is a stylized figure in the center resembling a person with a circle for the head and two ovals for the body.

A wooden armchair with a mid-century modern design features a green fabric upholstery. The chair has angled wooden legs and armrests, with a simple, clean aesthetic. The background is plain white, emphasizing the chair's structure and color.

A wooden mug with a rustic appearance, featuring a brown handle and metallic bands around the body. The mug has a textured surface and a sturdy, cylindrical shape, resembling traditional drinking vessels.

A ceramic container with a painted scene of a woman in a red and yellow dress holding a baby. The woman is seated, with a green landscape in the background. The container has a decorative border with colorful patterns. A wooden stick with a carved top is inserted into the container's opening.

A circular emblem with a dark gray background and an orange border. The number '5' is prominently displayed in the center, overlaid on crossed knives. The words 'FIVE YEAR VETERAN' are at the top, and 'COUNTER-STRIKE' at the bottom. 'TACTICS' and 'TEAMWORK' are on the left and right sides, respectively. A laurel wreath design is on the border.

A wooden silhouette of a donkey is depicted on a dark brown plank. The donkey is holding a stick in its mouth, and there is a smaller piece of wood resembling a horse's head on the right side. The background is white, and the donkey has circular cutouts along its body.
A wooden barrel with a cylindrical shape and metal bands encircling it. The barrel has a natural wood finish with visible grain patterns and is set against a plain white background.

A wooden telescope with a cylindrical shape and a dark brown finish is mounted on a tripod stand. The telescope has black bands and a central adjustment knob. The background is plain white, emphasizing the object.

A futuristic device with a cylindrical barrel and a triangular base, predominantly blue and white. The barrel has a textured blue surface with a hexagonal adjustment knob on top. The base is white with black accents and a central vertical support.

The image features a brown cane with a curved handle and a golden tip, resting on top of a stack of books. The books have yellow and blue covers with black accents. The background is plain white, emphasizing the objects.

The image features a decorative object with a red oval centerpiece adorned with white floral patterns. A black cord loops through the centerpiece and connects to a smaller round wooden piece with a red flower design on one end and a red bead on the other. The background is plain white.

A wooden chest with a metal frame and a lock. The chest has a rich brown wood texture with visible grain patterns. The metal parts are silver-gray, featuring a keyhole and decorative elements. The chest is closed and appears sturdy.

The image shows a weathered and rusty medical cabinet with a red cross symbol on the front. The cabinet has a rectangular shape with a slightly worn-out appearance, featuring red and gray colors with patches of green moss or mold. It has a handle on the top and a slot in the middle, suggesting it is used for dispensing medical supplies.
A burger with a toasted bun, melted cheese, lettuce, and a beef patty. The cheese is oozing out, and the lettuce is slightly wilted. The background is plain white, emphasizing the burger's details.

A pastel-colored backpack with a Hello Kitty pattern featuring multiple images of Hello Kitty in various poses. The backpack has a red zipper and red accents on the straps and handle. The background is white, highlighting the soft gradient of pink and blue on the backpack.

Two decorated gourds with intricate patterns are shown against a white background. Each gourd has a black base color with brown geometric designs and a protruding handle. Red tassels are attached to the handles, adding a contrasting color. The gourds are symmetrical and appear to be traditional musical instruments.

A stone pillar with a wooden top is shown. The pillar is made of irregularly shaped stones in various shades of gray, brown, and beige. The wooden top is smooth and brown, contrasting with the rough texture of the stones. The background is plain white, highlighting the pillar.

A red aluminum can of Coca-Cola with white script logo and text. The can features a barcode and product information, including ingredients and bottling details. The background is plain white, emphasizing the can's design.

The image shows an EpiPen, an auto-injector device for epinephrine. It is primarily yellow with a blue cap and an orange bottom. The label includes the text 'Epi Pen' and 'Epinephrine Autoinjector' along with a chemical structure diagram of adrenaline (epinephrine). There are black and white hazard symbols and the words 'Needle End' indicating the needle location.

A cylindrical object with a purple and blue swirling pattern is adorned with chains and purple gem-like protrusions. It has a conical top and a base with a green sphere and a gray tassel. The background is plain white.

The image shows a large industrial valve with a red handwheel on top. The valve body is metallic with a weathered, rusted appearance, featuring bolted flanges on both sides. The background is plain white, emphasizing the valve's details and colors.

A white bowl contains various fruits including an orange, two bananas, an apple, a kiwi, and a pomegranate. The fruits are arranged neatly, with the orange in the center and bananas on the right side. The bowl has a speckled pattern and is placed against a plain white background.

The image shows a circular object with a black center and a yellow outer ring. There are gray components attached around the perimeter, including a T-shaped structure in the center. The object appears mechanical, possibly a part of a vehicle or machinery, with a symmetrical design.
A textured apple with a mix of green and reddish-brown hues, featuring a brown stem. The apple has a slightly irregular shape with some dark spots on its surface. The background is plain white.

A weathered piece of driftwood with a rough, textured surface lies horizontally. The wood has a mix of gray, brown, and green colors, with moss growing on parts of it. The background is completely white, highlighting the natural, irregular shape of the wood.

A skeletal figure is mounted on a tall, yellow, pointed structure. The skeleton is positioned upright, with its hands gripping the structure. The background is plain white. The base is brown with a textured appearance, and the structure has a metallic sheen.

The image features an ancient Greek amphora with a black-figure design. Two figures are depicted on the vase, one holding a lyre and the other a circular object, possibly a tambourine. Both figures are in dynamic poses, suggesting movement or dance. The amphora has a narrow neck, a single handle, and a rounded body with a decorative band featuring a Greek key pattern. The background is plain, emphasizing the vase and its artwork.

A wooden mug with a handle is shown. The mug has a cylindrical shape with a slightly tapered bottom and is wrapped with two metal bands. The wood has a rich brown color with visible grain patterns, and the metal bands are gray. The handle is also gray and has a simple, curved design.

The image shows a futuristic, armored object with a green and gray color scheme. It features a central glowing blue core surrounded by geometric patterns and lines. The surface has a worn, metallic texture with some rust-like discoloration. There are circular symbols resembling radiation signs on the upper right side.

The image shows a speaker with a gray mesh front and a black control panel featuring two large circular dials and several buttons labeled 'MODE/ALARM', 'INFO', 'MENU', 'PLAY/PAUSE', 'MUTE', and 'VOL'. The speaker has a red border around the mesh and a black base.

The image shows a textured, ornate mug with a handle. The mug has a rustic appearance with intricate floral patterns embossed on its surface. It has a slightly curved top edge and a wide base, giving it a sturdy look. The color is a muted brown with darker accents highlighting the designs.

A spherical object resembling a planet with green grass and brown soil textures is floating in the air. Atop the sphere is a small yellow house with a red roof and a small fence around it. Below the sphere, there is a gray structure with a yellow emblem and a small flag attached.

A large container with a grid pattern is suspended by straps. The container is primarily blue with white text reading 'H2O Potable Water'. The top and bottom sections are dark, possibly indicating wear or dirt. The container appears to be used for transporting water.
A traffic cone-shaped object with alternating orange and white diagonal stripes. It has a handle at the top and a black base. The background is plain white.

A large, rectangular dumpster with a sloped lid is shown. The dumpster is primarily green with patches of rust and wear, indicating age and exposure to the elements. It has four wheels for mobility and a latch on the side. The background is plain white, emphasizing the dumpster's details.

Two wooden bird figures painted in red, black, and yellow are perched on a branch. The birds have red heads and bodies with black and white spots, and yellow tails. The background is plain white, emphasizing the vibrant colors of the birds.

A ceramic fountain with a reddish-brown vase-like top supported by two lizard-shaped handles. The base is a wide, shallow bowl with a greenish patina, showing signs of weathering. The overall shape is cylindrical with a flared top and a sturdy base.

The image shows a close-up of a wooden object with a textured surface, featuring dark brown and lighter brown streaks. The object has a rectangular shape with rounded edges and is partially encased in a yellow frame. The background is white, highlighting the object's details.

A white ceramic teapot with blue floral patterns and the name 'Victor' written on it. The teapot has a blue handle, spout, and lid. The design includes decorative motifs and a date '03/09/20' near the bottom.
A colorful cake with a yellow base, pink frosting, and a gray layer with black seeds. The top is decorated with bright pink icing and a yellow ball with green leaves.

The image features a medal with a white eagle with a crown, set against a red background. The eagle is centered on a gold starburst design with eight points. The medal has a gold border and a loop at the top for attachment.

A wooden mug with a rustic appearance, featuring metal bands with screws around its body. The handle is also made of metal, showing signs of wear and rust. The background is plain white, emphasizing the mug's texture and details.
The image features a seesaw with a triangular orange frame and a blue base. The seats are green with red handles, and the structure is mounted on a central pivot. The background is plain white.

A rusted metal door with a latch is slightly ajar. The door is pale yellow with brown rust stains and patches, showing signs of wear and age. The frame is also rusty, and there is some grass visible at the bottom.

The image shows a Game Boy Color with a green striped pattern. The screen displays the title screen of 'Pokémon Red Version' featuring a character and a Pokémon. Below the screen, there is a large yellow smiley face with a red heart-shaped mouth and a blue character with one eye peeking from the side. The Game Boy Color logo is visible below the screen.

A rusted, humanoid robot stands with a rectangular torso and round head, featuring two antennae. The body is covered in various stickers and graffiti, including words like 'HOPE' and symbols. The robot has a black circular face with two small eyes and is in a neutral stance with arms slightly bent. The background is plain white.

The image features a grotesque, humanoid telephone with a dial pad and a crank. The body resembles a fleshy, organic structure with a large eye in the center of the dial. The receiver and earpiece are shaped like a mouth and ear, respectively. The colors are primarily shades of brown, red, and beige, giving it a macabre appearance.

A futuristic security scanner with a digital display showing various graphs and symbols. The screen is teal with a central eye-like design and text reading 'AUTHORIZED PERSONNEL ONLY.' Below the screen is a red and black caution sign with diagonal stripes. The machine has a dark blue and black color scheme with a red logo featuring an 'S' on the lower part.

The image features a detailed, star-shaped object resembling a stylized animal face, possibly a mythical creature. It has prominent eyes, a wide mouth, and intricate patterns on its surface. The color palette includes shades of green and brown, with a textured, aged appearance. The background is plain white, emphasizing the object.

The image shows a mechanical device with a gray body, featuring a black knob on the left, a red button in the center, and two yellow dots below it. There are two gray protrusions on the right side. A long, light gray rod extends downward from the main body.

A high-top sneaker with a yellow and black color scheme. The shoe features a strap across the top with the Adidas logo, yellow laces, and a white sole with a yellow pattern on the bottom. The background is plain white.

A small robot with a square head and circular faceplate, featuring teal and rust-colored paint. It has a black antenna on top and a black neck. The body is cylindrical with three curved legs, each with black joints. The background is plain white.

A gray mechanical structure with red and blue accents is floating in the air. It has a boxy, angular design with various panels and components, including cylindrical elements and a red emblem. The background is completely white.

A bust sculpture of an older man with a gray beard and hair, wearing a dark suit and light blue shirt. The bust is mounted on a brown rectangular base with the name 'S. Freud' inscribed in yellow. The background is plain white.

A camouflage outfit with green, brown, and black patterns. The outfit includes a long-sleeve top with a green pocket and elastic cuffs, and matching pants with an elastic waistband and cuffs. The background is plain white.

A red mask with exaggerated facial features, including a wide smile and raised eyebrows, is shown. The mask has blue highlights around the eyes and nose, giving it a dramatic appearance. The background is white, emphasizing the mask's details and texture.

The image features a symmetrical, mechanical structure resembling armor or a robotic torso. It has a dark gray color with orange accents on the chest and arms. The design includes intricate details and segmented plates, giving it a futuristic appearance. The background is plain white, emphasizing the object's details.

The image features a cylindrical can with an orange background. It has three curved stripes in red, green, and blue. The phrase 'Shit Happens' is written in green graffiti-style text at the bottom. The can appears to have a textured surface with small white specks resembling condensation.

A grey fabric sofa with a textured pattern is shown. It has four cushions, with two decorative pillows: one grey and yellow, and another blue and white patterned. A blue throw is draped over the right side. The sofa has a simple, modern design with metal legs.

The image shows a circular, rusted metal object with a blue paint finish that is peeling off. The center has a circular indentation with a darker, worn area. The object appears to be a lid or cover, possibly for a tank or container, with a small protrusion at the top.

The image shows a yellow and black object with a rectangular shape and a warning label. It has a digital display at the top and a small black panel on the right side. The object appears to be a piece of machinery or equipment, possibly industrial, with a rugged texture.
A green desk with three drawers, each featuring a light blue handle. The desk has a simple, modern design with gray legs and a white border around the top surface. The background is plain white.

The image features a stylized skull with mechanical and robotic elements. It has large, circular eyes with intricate patterns and a metallic appearance. The skull is adorned with circular designs and lines, giving it a futuristic look. The color palette is primarily yellow and gray with some red accents. The background is plain white, emphasizing the skull's details.

The image shows a vertical object with a central maroon section flanked by teal-colored sides. There are three horizontal maroon bands connecting the sides, and an orange line runs vertically through the center. The background is plain white.

A circular target board mounted on a wooden post. The board has a concentric circle design with colors yellow, red, blue, black, and white from the center outward. The target is attached to a textured, gray and brown circular surface, likely made of wood or foam.
A pair of blue binoculars with purple and blue reflective lenses. The binoculars have a simple design with a central hinge connecting the two lens tubes. The background is plain white.

The image features a MSI Gaming Series sticker with a red dragon logo and the text 'I'M NOT HERE' on a black and red background. There is a QR code and a barcode at the bottom. A gray, cube-like object is placed on top of the sticker.

An industrial robotic arm with a brown body and black accents is mounted on a gray platform. The arm has multiple joints and a gripper at the end. There is a red emergency stop button on the base. The background is white, and the platform has yellow and white markings.

The image shows a rectangular object with a beige body and blue vertical accents on the sides. It has a white rectangular area at the top center and a gray rectangular area below it. The object is placed on a gray base.

The image shows a close-up of an eye with a detailed iris and visible blood vessels. The sclera is light pink, and the surrounding area is a deep red with white patches, resembling a cross-section of an eyeball. The eye is centrally positioned with a clear view of the pupil and iris.

A spherical object with a camouflage helmet and a blue and yellow face resembling a mask. It has two white eye shapes and is equipped with grenades, ammunition, and a firearm. The helmet features a military insignia.

The image shows a symmetrical object with a metallic gray body and orange accents. It has a rectangular central section with two orange panels and a small oval feature in the middle. The ends are hexagonal with perforated patterns. The background is plain white.

The image shows a vertical traffic light with three circular lights. The top light is red, the middle light is yellow, and the bottom light is green. The traffic light is encased in a yellow, weathered metal housing with visible rust and wear. The background is plain white.
A green, round toy with a smiling face, large eyes, and a small nose. It has red wheels and a red handle on top. The background is white.

An old, weathered wooden barrel with rusted metal bands. The barrel has a cylindrical shape with a slightly tapered top and bottom. The wood shows signs of aging, including moss and discoloration, with green and brown hues. The metal bands have a rusty orange color with patches of corrosion.
A metal shelving unit with four wooden shelves is shown. The frame is black, and the shelves have a light brown wood finish. The unit has a rectangular shape and stands on four legs with small caps.
A round table with a marble top and gold-colored legs and base. The table has a simple, elegant design with a white and gray marbled surface and a circular lower shelf.

An old-fashioned radio with a wooden frame and a beige speaker grille. The front panel is black with white dials and buttons, featuring frequency bands and station labels. The radio has a vintage design with a horizontal shape and a sturdy base.

A purple and black bottle with a beige rope tied around its neck. The bottle features white floral designs and purple swirl patterns. The cap is beige, and there is a decorative knot with a circular emblem on the rope.
The image shows a pair of over-ear headphones with a wooden frame and black ear cushions. The headband is curved and brown, while the side arms are yellow. The background is plain white.

A futuristic device with a central control panel displaying 'Location', 'Options', and 'Status'. It has a symmetrical design with orange and gray colors, featuring two side panels and a horizontal base. The structure includes geometric shapes and appears to be a technological apparatus, possibly a portal or scanner.

A pair of high-top sneakers with a black base and vibrant accents. The shoes feature neon green soles with a large black arrow design. Pink and blue laces add a pop of color, along with pink details on the tongue and heel. The background is plain white, highlighting the shoes' bold design.

The image shows a wooden mug with a hexagonal shape. It has a dark wood texture with two light yellow bands wrapped around the middle. The handle is also light yellow and extends outward from the mug.

A brown suede shoe with white stitching and a layered sole featuring red, white, and black sections. The shoe has a classic design with a rounded toe and a low heel. The background is plain white, emphasizing the shoe's details.

The image features a detailed statue with an ancient, possibly Mesoamerican design. The figure has a stern expression, adorned with intricate patterns and symbols. It wears a headdress with a face motif and holds a ceremonial object. The statue is primarily in shades of green, gold, and brown, with a textured surface and decorative elements like a necklace and shoulder armor.

The image features a futuristic-looking device with a brown and olive green color scheme. It has a speaker at the bottom, various buttons and lights, and a digital display with glowing yellow outlines. The top section has a handle and ventilation grills. The design suggests it could be a portable electronic gadget or speaker.

The image shows a worn and damaged 200 Czech koruna banknote featuring a portrait of a bearded man with long hair. The banknote is predominantly in shades of orange and green with intricate geometric patterns in the background. The text 'DVĚ STĚ KORUN ČESKÝCH' and 'ČESKÁ NÁRODNÍ BANKA' is visible, along with the denomination '200'. The banknote appears heavily creased and stained.

Two ripe bananas with brown spots and a sticker labeled 'Dole' are shown. The bananas are yellow with dark brown patches, indicating ripeness. The background is plain white, emphasizing the bananas' color and texture.

The image shows a worn-out, rectangular concrete barrier with an orange top. The concrete is weathered and has patches of rust and discoloration. The barrier has a flat top with a faded white line and several holes on the sides, likely for stacking or securing purposes.

A laptop displaying a Windows 10 desktop with a blue-themed background and various colorful tiles for applications. The screen shows the Start menu with pinned apps and a search bar. The laptop has a black bezel and a silver body.

The image shows a vintage Yashica-44 twin-lens reflex camera viewed from the top. It features two large lenses, one above the other, with a central dial marked with aperture settings.
